creator: ddegroot@talon.nl
text: Instead of using bswap / byteswap.h we could just use /usr/include/endian.h (linux) or /usr/include/sys/endian.h (bsd). They have the same definitions for htole16/htole32/le16toh/le32toh which is what we need. I have made the change upstream and testing it right now. For the time being you can use the patch you provided
